# Files that must be 100% line-covered in the WOLFNANO_SERVER build.
# These compile only under WOLFNANO_SERVER and are exercised by the dedicated
# `make servercov` pass, which builds the server shell ONCE with a single
# consistent flag set (SERVER + X509 + RSA_FULL) and runs the PSK, all-algo
# cert, and adversarial drivers against those shared objects. A single build
# is required: the ordinary server suites compile these files with differing
# flags (PSK-only vs X509 vs group variants), whose gcov line tables cannot be
# merged. Genuinely-unreachable defensive lines are marked /* LCOV_EXCL_LINE */.
src/wn_accept.c
src/wn_handshake.c
src/wn_servercert.c
